# dns-he-net_network_prefix (Data Source)

DNS network prefix

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve Network Prefix information.
data "dns-he-net_network_prefix" "example" {
  id = 123456
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) dns.he.net network prefix id

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) network prefix is enabled
- `value` (String) network prefix value
